notes: B0010.r41 restores simple Wi-Fi recovery on the corrected r40 baseline. DHCP/IP accepts and saves the profile immediately; DNS, clock and HTTPS validate quietly in the background and never disconnect a working link. Up to 10 Wi-Fi profiles, no RSSI rejection threshold, 30-second DHCP window, 15/30/60-second saved-network rescans, two-state Wi-Fi screen and local masked-password reveal. ESP-Hosted C6 2.12.9 remains external.
